I never would’ve found this trail or navigated it on my own. This company is an absolute mess. You’ll get a great view of the Hollywood signand it’s a pretty easy hike.
Fantastic hike with great views and a friendly, knowledgeable tour guide (JB). It was a perfect way to see the Hollywood sign and the greater Los Angeles area.

Can you do this hike solo?  Yes.
Should you?  Absolutely not!

Joe was incredible and we can't recommend him more.  We did the 1pm hike on a Sunday. It was not crowded. The weather was perfectly clear, slightly toasty.  We hiked with my 2 kids and my parents.  The hike is not strenous - my dad recently had his knee replaced and my 6 year old hiked in crocs.  

Joe was incredibly knowledgeable, hilarious, and besties with my kids by the time we finished the hike.  The photos Joe took are our favorite photos of our entire 10 day vacation! Joe also had great recommendations for dining and other sightseeing spots.
